addons.name: Torrentio
addons.description: The most popular torrent stream source — finds movie & series streams from public trackers.
addons.note: Works out of the box. Add a Real-Debrid / AllDebrid key in Configure for fast, cached streams.

addons.name: MediaFusion
addons.description: A broad streams aggregator (torrents + debrid) with lots of providers.
addons.note: Configure to pick providers (and a debrid key if you have one), then it installs.

addons.name: Comet
addons.description: Fast debrid-first stream finder — best if you have a debrid account.
addons.note: Built for debrid (Real-Debrid / AllDebrid / Premiumize). Configure to set it up.

addons.name: OpenSubtitles v3
addons.description: Subtitles in dozens of languages for almost everything.
addons.note: No setup needed — install and pick a language from the subtitle button while watching.
